title: erophila verna var. chlorina
intro: Erophila verna var. chlorina, also known as wood cramp or common wintercress, is a plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly to treat digestive issues such as indigestion and bloating, and to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia due to its sedative effects. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, including vitamin C, calcium, and iron, making it a valuable source of nutrition. Herbal preparations of Erophila verna var. chlorina can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
